text: The Eiffel Tower is approximately 330 meters tall.
Mount Everest is the tallest mountain on Earth, measured from sea level.
The Great Wall of China is visible to the naked eye from the Moon.
Humans only use 10% of their brains.
Water boils at 100 degrees Celsius at sea level atmospheric pressure.
The COVID-19 vaccine alters human DNA.
Photosynthesis converts carbon dioxide and water into glucose and oxygen using light energy.
A particular unreleased pharmaceutical compound, codenamed XR-4471, will receive FDA approval in 2027.
There are exactly 14,382 species of beetle currently undiscovered by science.
My neighbor's cat prefers tuna over salmon.
The next major earthquake on the San Andreas fault will occur within the next five years.
The United States declared independence in 1776.
Albert Einstein failed mathematics in school.
